title: Gravecrawl II: Deeper Dark
tagline: Pick a class, loot the dark, fall to the Throne of Ash.
blurb: Gravecrawl, deepened: classes, equipable gear, scrolls & potions, ranged and poisonous foes, themed biomes and a boss every fourth floor down to depth 12.

controls.action: Grab item / use shrine / open chest

whatsNew: Three classes (Warrior / Rogue / Sorcerer) with distinct kits & perks
Inventory + equipment: weapons, armor, potions & scrolls in a 5-slot belt
New foes incl. ranged archers/imps and poison/weaken/burn status appliers
Three themed biomes — Crypt, Caverns, Inferno — each tougher than the last
A boss every 4 floors, ending at the Ashen Throne (depth 12)
Risk/reward shrines & trapped chests scattered through the dark
